title: firmiana kerrii
intro: Firmiana kerrii, also known as the elephant ear or elephant heart, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The leaves and roots of Firmiana kerrii are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and are also believed to have anti-cancer properties. Firmiana kerrii is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in herbal infusions and salves to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
